title: Content rendering pipeline (markdown, mentions, hashtags)
description: Implement the pipeline that converts post text input into stored content_html. Steps: 1) Parse @mentions (local and remote), link them. 2) Parse #hashtags, link them. 3) Render markdown to HTML with pulldown-cmark. 4) Sanitize HTML with ammonia. 5) Store original text in posts.content and rendered HTML in posts.content_html. 6) Create mention rows in the mentions table for each @mention.
design: Mention parsing: regex or nom parser for @user@domain and @user (local). Resolve local mentions to accounts table, remote to remote_accounts (resolve if not cached). ammonia::Builder with allowlist of tags: a, br, p, strong, em, pre, code, ul, ol, li, blockquote. Hashtag parser: #[a-zA-Z0-9_]+ not followed by alphanumeric.
acceptance_criteria: @username@domain mention links to the remote profile URL; #hashtag becomes a link; markdown bold/italic/links render correctly; ammonia strips disallowed HTML tags; mention rows are created in mentions table; mention notification is created for mentioned local actors
